author: Webby 1972
title: Not useable
content: App is because of the adds totale useless. The x to close the add is to close to edge of the screen and not reacting.

author: CBißcuit
title: Just give Apple the money, don’t expect anything (working) in return. Like a charity.
content: I bought this laggy app with several broken functions. Settings are messy and all over the place, and the design feels outdated and clumsy, the app is just eating up battery. And the app is not working anymore. The innovation; just another money grab! Secretly updating their refund decision without an email. Give them… the money. It’s a charity!

author: MaxPowerrrr
title: Amazing offline music player
content: I have been using cloud music solutions for a long time now. While they are great for discovery of new music, I was missing the ability to manage my favorite album collections in an effective way, especially in combination with offline listening. Now with Flacbox, I have total freedom again which of my favorite digitized CDs I would like to have in my collection. Browsing through this collection in Flacbox is super easy, with many options that you would expect to have. And it has great an Apple CarPlay interface, much more effective in finding my favorite albums before starting my drive somewhere than the cloud applications. Flacbox is like having my iPod classic back again, for endless offline listening sessions.

author: Gastonjourdan
title: Ads ads ads…
content: Good player with nice functionalities. The ads, however, are very intrusive and ruin the experience.

author: Andmetwo
title: Very bad clumsy interface, waste of money
content: Very bad clumsy interface, absolutely terrible file management, unnecessary functionality which you CAN NOT disable, overall outdated design. Waste of money!

author: hans leuk
title: Meta files
content: I use a program in Windows that wil solve that problem for you and its cald EZ CD converter

author: Feja
title: Geweldige app, heel blij mee!
content: Sinds ik een proefabonnement bij Apple Music heb gehad, was mijn muziekbibliotheek op mijn Mac een rommeltje en kon ik niet meer goed synchroniseren met mijn nieuwe iPad. Daarom ging ik op zoek naar een aternatief, en vond dat uiteindelijk in deze app. Al mijn muziekalbums staan er keurig in. Zo blij mee! Wel een kleine opmerking naar de ontwikkelaars: geef er een video bij met een duidelijke handleiding. Het was namelijk wel een hele uitzoekerij. Maar afgezien daarvan: helemaal top!

author: Halzyn
title: Mostly great
content:
Works well for the most part, but unfortunately most of the embedded album art for my flac files won’t display at all. Would love to see this fixed, as I spent a lot of time meticulously tagging all my files.
Weirdly enough the album covers do show up when opening the audio tag editor. But they don’t show up in the Now Playing screen.

author: MenDijk
title: Top app
content:
Top app voor afspelen van alle soorten audiobestanden.
Een goeie equalizer en indien nodig een volume booster

TOP

author: Reza van harte
title: Verrrrrrry good
content: Perfect

author: hdnauta
title: Nice app
content:
Some improvements, the user interface could be better, specifically when browsing unpnp media server.

Als please add gapless playback.

author: brahamrotterdam
title: Much improved since version 4
content: My first review was not so good but man, this app has much improved since then. Quicker synchronization and quicker in response and still the improvements are coming. I would say buy the version. An issue that I still have is that when I cast to google nest audio the connection is lost. Otherwise it would get 5 stars

author: cx1964
title: Geen Webdav verbinding meer en limited edition
content: Heb de gekochte versie van programma. Waarom wordt limited version getoond。 Ook doet de tot nu altijd werkende webdav verbinding hetmniet meer。

author: Falanako
title: costs €9,99 : replica of Evermusic Player
content: Not FrEE

author: Martijn.1987
title: Prima hi-res speler
content: Perfect voor mijn dsd bestanden, heel fijn luisteren via speakers en AirPods

author: Eisb43r
title: screwed up
content: With every update the UI is becoming worse. And that is still the case. My carefully set folder structure is now gone with the last update. What an idiot.

author: palantir135
title: Crash
content: The app hangs itself every few minutes while synchronizing from a NAS (Dlna). Syncing is sooo slow.

author: JohnnyDune
title: Lossless player via webdav
content:
Uitstekende lossless player voor o.a. Apple Lossless (.m4a).
Mijn muziekcollectie heeft een backup in de cloud, die via webdav bereikbaar is. Flacbox werkt hier uitstekend mee!

author: Acorpze
title: Decent but needs improvement
content:
Good app so far, I’ve been using it to play music in OGG Vorbis format.

I would give it more stars but here is why I didn’t:
-There seems to be a major stuttering issue,
the app works fine alone but will start stuttering once you tab out to another app and sometimes even crashes.

-I think sound normalization is a must have since not all audio is recorded/produced with the same output volume, often resulting in noticeable differences in loudness.

-Not a major issue but.. pitch correction feels a bit off.
I feel like pitch correction just attempts to shift the pitch without properly resampling/stretching the audio and sounds faulty.

In most other audio players I am able to change the pitch of the audio and it will sound like as if the audio was actually recorded with said pitch which is not the case here unfortunately.

I don’t have much else to add since I have all my files locally downloaded so I cannot really review the cloud features of this app.

author: Kirmesexpress
title: Speelt niet rechtsreeks af van computer
content:
Om bestanden naar een iphone te kopieren hoef ik dit programma 
niet. Rechtstreeks afspelen van server of computer doet het niet.
Vlc player kan dit wel.

author: Ron257
title: Hopeless
content:
Do not understand that after all the years of existence this player is   
still not able to play Flac playlists without a hitch?!

author: Niet-Rick
title: Despicable screen filled ad
content: No longer working for me because of a despicable screen filled ad. Sent a mail to Support on august 13th last year about it, they only got back to me today (may 4th 2020) advising me to upgrade to the latest version. Since a timely response wasn’t possible i stopped using this app.

author: Godbluffer
title: Gapless not working anymore etc
content:
To my shock I found out that gapless playback is not working anymore with Apple lossless (.m4a) files, and something worse had happened with FLAC files; only ONE of the two stereo channels was being played, as ‘mono’ through both speakers.

That second issue has now been resolved, but gapless playback *must* make a return in the next update.

author: Patje2014
title: Werkt prima
content: Deze app vooral in gebruik om naast mp3 flac af te spelen. Heb eigenlijk weinig last van dat een 24 bits bestand stottert, alleen als de verbinding slecht is gezien ik m'n Google drive heb gekoppeld aan deze speler waar de flac bestanden op staan. Voor de gene die daar wel last van hebben verhoog je buffer tijd eens.

author: PaulB851
title: Ok
content: Het programma speelt zonder problemen mijn FLACs af, maar het downloaden van muziek van de NAS naar de iPhone duurt heel erg lang, terwijl de rest van de verbindingen (Router etc) erg snel zijn.

author: Ditilia
title: Renato
content: Prima flacplayer die zonder stotteren 16bit (cd kwaliteit) van je NAS speelt. Flacbox pretendeert 24bit af te kunnen spelen maar dan stottert hij. Gebruik hem voor Chromecast en dat gaat goed. Zeer irritant is dat hij tussen ieder nummer een korte pauze neemt om te laden. Geen player voor progrockers waarbij alle nummers achter elkaar worden gespeeld. "Whirlwind" van Transatlantic of Marillions "Misplaced Chilhood" is niet leuk luisteren.

author: PetraO.
title: Prima app
content: Ontspannen via bluetooth naar muziek op je NAS luisteren. Doet alles watie moet doen.

author: MiR01
title: Uitkomst
content: Perfecte oplossing voor luisteren van je eigen collectie FLACs. App werkt erg goed.

author: Albert123Albert
title: Flacbox
content:
Prima
Excellent
100%

author: Jos56
title: PERFECT!!!!!
content:
Have been looking for something like this for a while, and suddenly it appears!
Forget all other players this is it!
